EstimatedRemainingTimeContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO EstimatedRemainingTimeContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'ceil(SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric * ETPercentileRawMetric)/(ActWorkerCores * ActWorkerCardinality)', 'SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric,ETPercentileRawMetric', SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM SimulationLeftNumber.std:lastevent() AS SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile.std:lastevent() AS ETPercentile
NotFinishedOnTimeContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO NotFinishedOnTimeContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'EstimatedRemainingTime - (3600-SimulationElapsedTimeRawMetric)', 'EstimatedRemainingTime,SimulationElapsedTimeRawMetric', EstimatedRemainingTimeContext, SimulationElapsedTime ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM EstimatedRemainingTimeContext.std:lastevent() AS EstimatedRemainingTimeContext, SimulationElapsedTime.std:lastevent() AS SimulationElapsedTime
WillFinishTooSoonContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO WillFinishTooSoonContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'EstimatedRemainingTime-(0.8*(3600-SimulationElapsedTimeRawMetric))', 'EstimatedRemainingTime,SimulationElapsedTimeRawMetric', EstimatedRemainingTimeContext, SimulationElapsedTime ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM EstimatedRemainingTimeContext.std:lastevent() AS EstimatedRemainingTimeContext, SimulationElapsedTime.std:lastevent() AS SimulationElapsedTime
MinimumCoresContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO MinimumCoresContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'ceil(SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric/floor((3600-SimulationElapsedTimeRawMetric)/ETPercentileRawMetric))', 'SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric,ETPercentileRawMetric,SimulationElapsedTimeRawMetric', SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile, SimulationElapsedTime ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM SimulationLeftNumber.std:lastevent() AS SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile.std:lastevent() AS ETPercentile, SimulationElapsedTime.std:lastevent() AS SimulationElapsedTime
NotFinishedOnTime:
/* CONSTR-MET-any */ /*INSERT INTO NotFinishedOnTime*/
SELECT * FROM NotFinishedOnTimeContext HAVING NotFinishedOnTimeContext.metricValue >= 0.0
WillFinishTooSoon:
/* CONSTR-MET-any */ /*INSERT INTO WillFinishTooSoon*/
SELECT * FROM WillFinishTooSoonContext HAVING WillFinishTooSoonContext.metricValue <= 0.0
FinishedTooSoon:
/* SLO-any */ /*INSERT INTO FinishedTooSoon*/
SELECT * FROM WillFinishTooSoon
NotFinished:
/* SLO-any */ /*INSERT INTO NotFinished*/
SELECT * FROM NotFinishedOnTime

ETPercentile:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO ETPercentile*/
SELECT * FROM ETPercentile_Sensor
SimulationLeftNumber:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO SimulationLeftNumber*/
SELECT * FROM SimulationLeftNumber_Sensor
SimulationElapsedTime:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO SimulationElapsedTime*/
SELECT * FROM SimulationElapsedTime_Sensor
